scripts.copy:es: npm run build-steam:es && mkdir -p src-tauri/assets && cp ../build/steam/es/sworcery.dat* src-tauri/assets/ || true
scripts.copy:pt: npm run build-steam:pt && mkdir -p src-tauri/assets && cp ../build/steam/pt/sworcery.dat* src-tauri/assets/ || true
scripts.dev:es: npm run copy:es && VITE_APP_LOCALE=es tauri dev
scripts.dev:pt: npm run copy:pt && VITE_APP_LOCALE=pt tauri dev
scripts.build:es: npm run copy:es && VITE_APP_LOCALE=es tauri build && mkdir -p ../build/patcher/es && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/* ../build/patcher/es/ || true
scripts.build:pt: npm run copy:pt && VITE_APP_LOCALE=pt tauri build && mkdir -p ../build/patcher/pt && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/* ../build/patcher/pt/ || true
